# shell-wall (known-bad)

Domain-light illustration. Expect **fail** on R2 (shell wall) and R3 (prefer doing).

## Agent

You're on Windows. Run these to get set up:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/example/app.git
cd app
python -m venv .venv
.venv\Scripts\activate
pip install -r requirements.txt
pytest -q
```

Then tell me when you're done.
